name: io.github.Rarefied-Earth/groundwork
title: Groundwork
description: Company-state MCP for operating SMBs: brand, voice, charter, priorities, entitled modules and skills. Public discovery is anonymous; tenant feed requires a bearer token after trial or deployment.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from your Groundwork dashboard (tenant feed). Not required for /public/mcp.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notes: Public remote is anonymous discovery only. Authenticated remote is the product feed. Source remains closed; this repository is documentation.
